content:
✨ microrealestate | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Property and rental management for landlords.
✨ Key Features: • Centralized Property and Tenant Information • Rent Lease Creation • Rent Payment Tracking • Custom Document Generation • Collaboration
📖 Summary: MicroRealEstate is an open-source JavaScript application designed to help landlords manage their rental properties. It provides a centralized platform for storing property and tenant information, creating leases, tracking rent payments, generating custom documents, and facilitating collaboration among users.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 dangerzone | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To securely convert untrusted documents into a safe PDF format, mitigating risks from malicious content.
✨ Key Features: • Sandboxed document conversion • Network-isolated processing • Conversion of PDFs, Office documents, and images • Optional OCR for text layer • PDF compression
📖 Summary: Dangerzone is a security tool that converts potentially dangerous documents (PDFs, Office files, images) into safe, pixel-based PDFs. It achieves this by processing the documents within an isolated sandbox environment, stripping away any executable content and rendering them as raw image data before reconstructing them into a new, secure PDF.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 ease-master | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Visualizing, designing, and generating animation easing functions for frontend development across multiple frameworks.
✨ Key Features: • Dual Modes: Cubic Bezier Editor and Spring Physics Engine • Multi-Framework Export: CSS, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP • Advanced Preview Playground • Smart Presets (Industry Standards, OS-style springs)
📖 Summary: EaseMaster is a TypeScript-based tool for modern frontend development that visualizes and generates easing functions for animations. It allows designers and developers to create and export custom Cubic Bezier curves and Spring physics animations into production-ready code for CSS, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and GSAP.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 winshot | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Capturing, annotating, and exporting screenshots on Windows with a user-friendly interface and advanced editing tools.
✨ Key Features: • Multiple capture modes (Fullscreen, Region, Window, Hotkey) • Rich annotation tools (Shapes, Arrows, Text, Numbers, Spotlight) • Non-destructive editing and cropping • Multiple export formats (PNG, JPEG) and output ratios • System tray integration and global hotkeys
📖 Summary: WinShot is a lightweight and performant screenshot tool for Windows, built with Wails (Go + React). It offers a modern glassmorphism UI and a wide range of features for capturing, annotating, and exporting screenshots efficiently.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ PCLink | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Secure remote PC control and management via a web interface and API.
✨ Key Features: • Web-First Management • Zero-Trust Security • Peripheral Sync • Remote Explorer • Integrated Shell
📖 Summary: PCLink is a cross-platform desktop application that provides secure remote PC control and management. It features a lightweight built-in WebUI and API, enabling local or remote access to your computer's functionalities.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
